my_thoughts: He's already split?indulgence ideal vs practiced discipline. Next step: force him to choose which he defends and show the inconsistency.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student claims disciplined self ('Of course not. I exercise discipline like any man of sense')?cooperative engagement via denies_hypocrisy. They understand: discipline is needed despite earlier indulgence thesis. Constraint_collapse/UM_02 seeds the contradiction: if discipline is needed, 'indulge everything' fails. Pattern: indulgence stance + discipline admission queued. Confidence medium because pointing at hypocrisy often provokes resistance.
visible_response: Yet you said the best life is the unrestrained one.
